description_long: This rifle features a broad, rectangular main body with a thick, flat blade-like barrel extending forward, giving it a robust and imposing appearance. The handle is textured and appears to be ergonomically designed, with a red-brown coloration that contrasts with the otherwise dark, metallic body. The trigger guard and trigger are visible beneath the main body, and the rear of the rifle is capped with a rounded, dark end piece. The rifle's upper surface is flat and unadorned, lacking visible rails or attachments, and the overall design is angular and utilitarian. The magazine is not externally visible, suggesting it may be internal or integrated into the body. The finish is matte, with minimal reflectivity, and the construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components.
description: A large, angular rifle with a broad, flat barrel and a textured, red-brown handle. The design is robust, matte, and utilitarian, with minimal external attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the broad, flat barrel and the textured handle with a red-brown grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the squared-off muzzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the broad, flat barrel and handle details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded end cap and the alignment of the handle and barrel.
